content.query:
IF NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT * 
    FROM sys.tables t JOIN sys.schemas s ON t.schema_id = s.schema_id WHERE t.name = 'DimCustomer'AND s.name = 'gold')

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE gold.DimCustomer
WITH
(
    LOCATION = 'DimCustomer',
    DATA_SOURCE = gold_source,
    FILE_FORMAT = parquet
)
AS
SELECT
    DISTINCT
    CustomerID,
    CustomerName,
    CustomerEmail,
    Domain,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY CustomerID) AS DimCustomerKey
FROM
    silver.SilverTable











IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.tables t JOIN sys.schemas s 
ON t.schema_id = s.schema_id WHERE t.name = 'DimProduct'AND s.name = 'gold')

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE gold.DimProduct
WITH
(
    LOCATION = 'DimProduct',
    DATA_SOURCE = gold_source,
    FILE_FORMAT = parquet
)
AS
SELECT
    DISTINCT
    ProductID,
    ProductName,
    ProductCategory,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY CustomerID) AS DimProductKey
FROM
    silver.SilverTable
    








IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.tables t JOIN sys.schemas s 
ON t.schema_id = s.schema_id WHERE t.name = 'DimGeography'AND s.name = 'gold')

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE gold.DimGeography
WITH
(
    LOCATION = 'DimGeography',
    DATA_SOURCE = gold_source,
    FILE_FORMAT = parquet
)
AS
SELECT
    DISTINCT
    RegionID,
    Country,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY CustomerID) AS DimGeographyKey
FROM
    silver.SilverTable










IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.tables t JOIN sys.schemas s 
ON t.schema_id = s.schema_id WHERE t.name = 'DimOrder'AND s.name = 'gold')

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE gold.DimOrder
WITH
(
    LOCATION = 'DimOrder',
    DATA_SOURCE = gold_source,
    FILE_FORMAT = parquet
)
AS
SELECT
    OrderID,
    CustomerName,
    CustomerID,
    CustomerEmail,
    ProductID,
    ProductName,
    ProductCategory,
    Domain
    RegionID,
    Country,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY CustomerID) AS DimOrderKey
FROM
    silver.SilverTable
